subject: Action required to Verify your Selling on Amazon Account
body_preview:
96
 Hi,
 You're receiving this email because you recently applied to sell on Amazon or you recently reactivated your seller account.
 Maintaining a trusted marketplace for buyers and sellers is our top priority. Before you can start or resume Selling on Amazon, we ask that you go through a document verification and review process. Any existing listings for your account will be suspended while the review is in progress.
 Please follow the step-by-step instructions below to submit your documents for verification:
- Use below link to access the Seller Identity Verification process.
- Amazon North America
- Amazon Australia
- Follow the instructions provided as part of the Seller Identity Verification process to upload your documents, which our team will verify.
- Upon being successfully verified, you will be allowed to sell on Amazon.
- To start the verification for your account in United States, Mexico, Brazil or Canada, please use “Begin Verification in North America”.
- To start the verification for your account in Australia, Japan or Singapore, please use “Begin Verification in Australia”.
 Begin Verification in North America
 Begin Verification in Australia
 Sincerely,
 The Selli

subject: Your Amazon bank account information has been successfully updated
body_preview:
96
 Your Amazon bank account information has been successfully updated
 Hello from Amazon,
You have successfully modified the bank account information associated with your Seller account. This change will not affect any transfer of funds initiated prior to this change.
If this change involved adding a new bank account, your future transfers will be submitted to this new bank account. Please note that there is a mandatory three-day security hold before any changes to the bank account information take effect. Transfers of funds cannot be initiated until after that period, which starts on the date that you submit your new bank account information in your seller account.
If this change involved removing a bank account, the removal was successful and future transfers will be submitted to the bank account that is already associated with your seller account.
You can update your bank account information at any time in the Settings section of your seller account. For additional information, please visit our online help pages.
If you did not modify your bank account information, please contact Seller Support/Selling Partner Support .
Thank you for selling on Amazon,
Amazon Services

subject:
SELLER: A3EMLON09P9W7A, ASIN: B0GCG8N4GK, MARKETPLACE: 771770 - PS
 - DOC REVIEW
body_preview:
Dear Selling Partner,
Thank you for your interest in listing your products on Amazon.
Please be informed that your ASIN is considered Magnetic Tiles. Therefore, please provide the required documentation in order to move forward with the approval process:
Magnet Hazard Warning or 16 CFR 1262 Safety Standard for Magnets. or NOM-252-SSA1-2011 or SOR/2011-17
How do I provide the requested documents?
1. In Seller Central, select the Performance tab and choose Account Health.
2. Under Manage your compliance in the bottom right corner, click Product Compliance Requests.
3. To add compliance or appeal for a product, click Add/Appeal Compliance.
4. Provide compliance documents and information in the Provide Documents section, or provide appeal information in the Appeal Request section.
5. Click Submit for Approval to send your submission for review by Amazon.
We appreciate your cooperation.
To help us continually improve, we ask that you take a moment to complete our survey below. This would help us understand your overall compliance experience.
Were you satisfied with the support provided?
If yes, please click here:
http://www.amazon.mx/gp/help/survey?p=AIGS4U7LYMT1R&k=hy

 Submit UK import details by 21/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Weihai EU,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 21/05/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.
 What happens if I don’t submit these details?

subject: RE:[CASE 12254062532] 需要采取行动：请向亚马逊提交您的EPR包装法注册号
body_preview:
【请勿回复】
尊敬的销售合作伙伴，
《2025/40包装和包装废弃物法规》（PPWR）为所有欧盟国家引入了新要求，旨在使包装更具可持续性、减少废弃物并支持循环经济。相关要求预计于2026年8月12日起正式生效。
您需要为每个销售包装及包装产品的欧盟成员国，分别获取一个对应国家的EPR包装注册号。包括您已注册“EPR代付服务”的国家。提交有效的包装EPR注册号（ERN）后，您可继续参与EPR代付服务——由我们负责及时完成您在亚马逊店铺销售的环保款项申报、填报及付款。
【如何完成合规？】
1. 为简化法国、意大利和西班牙的EPR包装注册流程并协助您完成注册，我们与服务提供商建立了合作，提供具有竞争力的收费方案：
• 协助您获取法国、意大利和西班牙的包装注册号
• 代表您担任授权代表（如适用）
如需 Evat Master/AVASK联系： 请访问 https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/gc/epr-compliance/epr-registration-packaging?ref=121_SET_PPWR 根据步骤1提示选择您的服务提供商，通过卖家平台服务中心表单提交您的联系信息。
注意：填写注册表时，请务必根据提示完整填写您的信息。填写后我们将与服务提供商共享您的业务信息，服务提供商将在72小时内与您联系，提供更多合规服务信息。
2. 如果您已注册“EPR代付服务”（法国、意大利、西班牙）且拥有有效注册号：您需要将号码上传到亚马逊平台，但上传时您仍然可以选择继续参与代付服务或退出以便自行管理EPR销售申报环保费用。
如何操作：请访问： https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/gc/epr-compliance/epr-registration-packaging?ref=121_SET_PPWR 根据步骤2提示完成选择。
3. 此外，您也可以通过以下任一途径搜索并选择服务提供商、授权代表完成EPR所有欧盟国家包装法号码注册：
1) 亚马逊服务商网络：https://spn.globalsellingcommunity.cn/discover
2) 卖家服务商城： https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/service-hub （包装法服务即将上线）。
更多详细指导，请参考此合规手册：https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/PPWR_Compliance_Guidebook.pdf
如有疑问，请扫码加入亚马逊卖家合规群：
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/mass_wecom_jm.jp

 Why is this happening?
We have taken this measure because we suspect your listing for this product infringes on the intellectual property of others. The listing of this product uses the protected copyright image of a rights owner on its product detail page. We have not been able to confirm that you are authorized to use this copyrighted image on the product detail page. Unauthorized use of copyright image is likely to cause confusion as to the source, endorsement or affiliation of the goods. Infringement of copyright is a violation of Amazon’s Intellectual Property Policy .

添加您的税务信息

了解更多关于欧洲增值税注册要求的信息：sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/GTQ23HPXBQK563WS

subject:
Submit your Prime Day 2026 Deals on March 24, review updated fees
 and eligibility
body_preview:
96
 Get ready to make this Prime Day your best yet.
 Hello,
 Get ready to make this Prime Day your best yet. We’ve made changes to promotion eligibility requirements to ensure deals deliver the value customers expect during our biggest shopping events like Prime Day. We’ve also simplified promotion fees to better align your costs and set FBA inbound dates to ensure your products are Prime-ready for the big event.
 Promotional eligibility
 To ensure deals offer substantial value to customers, and in turn drive higher engagement and more sales for you, Prime Exclusive price discounts and deals must now:
- Be priced at or below the lowest sales price, including promotional prices from previous deals, coupons and price discounts, over the past 60 days .
- Offer at least 5% off the lowest sales price, including promotional prices from previous deals, coupons and price discounts, over the past 30 days . We’re also giving you more time to act. The deal submission window will be open from March 24, 2026, through June 19, 2026. To schedule a deal, go to Create a new deal .
 For full eligibility details, go to Deals for events and Price discounts and events .
 You can use the Deals dashboard

body_preview:
Second Reminder: Upcoming changes to MCF and Buy with Prime packaging
Dear there,
Thank you for being a valued member of the Amazon Multichannel Fulfillment (MCF) and Buy with Prime community. We are reaching again out to make sure you have seen that starting in April 2026, MCF and Buy with Prime will introduce two updates to how orders are packaged and shipped in the United States:
Packing slips will no longer be included by default.
Items already certified for the Ships in Product Packaging (SIPP) program on Amazon.com will ship without an Amazon overbox by default.

subject: Åtgärd krävs: Dina produktposter har inaktiverats
body_preview:
96
Hej säljare!
Vi har tillfälligt avaktiverat produktposterna som visas längst ner i det här e-postmeddelandet.
 Varför händer det här?
Vi har vidtagit den här åtgärden eftersom vi misstänker att din produktpost för den här produkten kan göra intrång i andras immateriella rättigheter. Produktposten för den här produkten använder den skyddade upphovsrättsbilden från en rättighetsägare på dess produktinformationssida. Vi har inte kunnat bekräfta att du har behörighet att använda den här upphovsrättsskyddade bilden på produktinformationssidan. Obehörig användning av upphovsrättsskyddade bilder kan leda till osäkerhet varornas ursprung, garanti eller anknytning. Intrång av upphovsrätt är en överträdelse mot Amazons policy för immateriella rättigheter .
 Hur åtgärdar jag brottet mot policyn för produktposter?
För att åtgärda brott mot policyn för produktposter klickar du på Lös bredvid varje berört ASIN i avsnittet Misstänkta intrång i immateriella rättigheter på sidan Kontostatus . Överträdelsen, tillsammans med namnet på varumärket som äger den upphovsrättsskyddade bilden, finns under kolumnen Orsak på sidan Efterlevnad av produktpolicy.
För att överklaga måste du skicka in produktpo

subject: Votre paiement est en cours
body_preview:
96
This title will display on mobile devices
 Félicitations ! Votre paiement est en cours et arrivera sous peu.
 Tentative de versement
Félicitations, Xiangyuexin ! Votre paiement est en cours et arrivera sous trois à cinq jours.
Le 03/19/26 15:42 CET, nous avons effectué un virement d’un montant de €
 379,62 sur le compte lié à votre méthode de paiement (compte bancaire se terminant par 944).
 Si le montant est inférieur au montant auquel vous vous attendiez, voici quelques points à prendre en compte :
 Disposez-vous d’un solde de fonds indisponibles ? Amazon peut réserver des fonds afin de couvrir de potentiels retours, réclamations ou rétrofacturations des acheteurs. Si tel est le cas, le solde de fin de période de votre rapport sur les paiements affichera le solde des fonds indisponibles réservé.
 Vos ventes couvraient-elles l’ensemble des frais et des retours pour cette période de règlements ? Le montant du paiement reflète votre activité commerciale, les frais de vente et les frais relatifs aux promotions et aux services. Nous vous recommandons de consulter votre rapport sur les paiements sous l’onglet Rapports de Seller Central pour comprendre votre solde de fin de période.

subject: Acción requerida: Tus anuncios se han desactivado
body_preview:
96
Estimado vendedor:
Hemos desactivado temporalmente los listings que aparecen al final de este correo electrónico.
 ¿A qué se debe esto?
El ASIN se ha retirado porque sospechamos que el listing de este producto infringe la propiedad intelectual de terceros. El listing de este producto utiliza una imagen protegida con derechos de autor de un titular de los derechos en la página de detalles del producto. No hemos podido confirmar que tengas una autorización para utilizar esta imagen sujeta a derechos de autor en la página de detalles del producto. El uso no autorizado de imágenes sujetas a derechos de autor puede causar confusión sobre el origen, patrocinio o afiliación de los productos. La infracción de los derechos de autor supone el incumplimiento de la Política de propiedad intelectual de Amazon .
 ¿Cómo puedo solucionar la infracción en una publicación?
Para solucionar la infracción en una publicación, haz clic en "Resolver" junto a cada ASIN afectado en la sección "Supuestas infracciones de la propiedad intelectual" de la página "Estado de la cuenta" . La infracción, junto con el nombre de la marca que es titular de la imagen sujeta a derechos de autor, se pueden encontrar en

subject:
Reduce Returns & Boost Customer Satisfaction - Enrol in Amazon
 Product Support
body_preview:
96
 Enrol now into Amazon Product Support !
 Hello,
 Greetings from Amazon Product Support.

The serial number can be either a 2D Transparency branded barcode (these are 26 characters long and include a "T" logo) or a 1D or 2D serial number barcode (these are between 7 and 20 characters long and may include the pre-fix "SN").

 You are receiving this message because you have stranded inventory in an Amazon fulfilment centre that is scheduled for automatic removal. For a full view of stranded units scheduled for automatic removal, visit the stranded inventory dashboard and sort by auto-removal date.
 Review stranded inventory
 Why is this happening?
 Inventory can be scheduled for automatic removal for a variety of reasons. In this case, the reason is that the inventory is stranded. Stranded inventory is inventory without a buyable offer and requires you to either reactivate the listing or remove the inventory.
 What happens if I don't take action?
 Your stranded inventory will be returned or disposed of based on the settings you selected on “Fix stranded inventory”. To customize your settings, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Edit automatic action settings.
 If you need more time to appeal or fix a stranded inventory issue, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Delay auto removal for 30 days from the drop-down menu for each listing.

subject: FBA reimbursement notification
body_preview:
96
FBA reimbursement notification
 You have a reimbursement activity
 Hello from Fulfilment by Amazon,
We have initiated a reimbursement, a reimbursement reversal, or both due to recent activity on your selling account. No action is required from you.
Reimbursements can be initiated for an issue that you notified us about or one that we identified at a fulfilment centre. A reimbursement reversal occurs when a reimbursement decision has been reviewed and changed. Reimbursement amounts are determined in accordance with the FBA inventory reimbursement policy ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/external/200213130 ).
Please note that it may take up to five business days for reimbursement transactions to appear in your seller account.
You can find details on your reimbursement or reversal transaction in the Reimbursements report ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/reportcentral/REIMBURSEMENTS/0 ) in Seller Central:
- In the Event Date drop-down menu, select a date range and click Generate report . You can use the date in the subject line of this email as a point of reference.
- To identify inventory reimbursements and reversals, see the Quantity reimbursed [inventory] column.

subject: RE:[CASE 11569978862] 【需立即行动】请通过亚马逊认可的TIC服务商完成儿童玩具合规
body_preview:
尊敬的卖家：
我们紧急通知您，您部分在【欧洲】各站点的部分【儿童玩具】商品尚未完成合规，即将面临下架风险。为避免下架，请在截止日期之前完成以下操作，并确保TRF状态更新为【正在验证】。
① 提交TRF（务必在确认好合作的TIC或进行第二步之前完成，并确保TRF ID成功生成）
• 登录卖家平台，进入【绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题】，找到需处理ASIN
• 点击右侧【提交】，选定TIC服务提供商后点击【继续】提交TRF，完成可在页面查看TRF ID。
② 向TIC服务提供商支付费用；
③ 向TIC服务提供商寄送产品样品或提交您已有的外部检测报告或合规文件。
④ 确保TIC服务商将TRF状态更新为【正在验证】
如何查看TRF状态：在绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题找到ASIN，点击右方“提交，查看或更新”>“验证您的商品”
⚠️请注意：
① 同一ASIN可能只在部分欧洲站点被触发通知，若您计划在欧洲（英国及欧盟）继续销售，只需为每个ASIN任选一个站点完成合规，测试结果将同步至全欧站点。
② 由于数据可能存在延迟，请务必以卖家平台【绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题】页面显示的最新状态为准。
③ 如果您认为您的产品不属于【儿童玩具】产品，请选择【申诉请求】选项，提供您认为产品被错误识别的原因进行申诉。
感谢您的支持，祝您合规大卖
如有疑问，请扫码加入亚马逊卖家合规群：
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/mass_wecom_yt.jpg
Amazon Global Selling Seller Compliance Team

 Submit UK import details by 08/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Xiangyuexin,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 08/05/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.

Submit UK import details by 07/05/2026 to avoid shipping
 restrictions
body_preview:
96
 Submit UK import details by 07/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Xiangyuexin,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 07/05/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.
 What happens if I don’t submit these details?
 You have 60 days after first

 Hello Bailian direct,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 06/05/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.

The authority has raised concerns under UK Toy Safety Regulations citing oral ingestion risk and choking hazard.

a. Declaration of Conformity.

 Update to OTDR listing deactivation process as of February 28
 Effective February 28, 2026, we’ll update how we apply the existing 90% on-time delivery rate (OTDR) requirement for seller-fulfilled listings. Previously, if your OTDR fell below 90%, all of your seller-fulfilled listings would be deactivated. With this change, only the listings that have the most impact on your ratings drop will be deactivated. Read more .

 Effective March 1, Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA) removal and disposal fees will be charged on a per-unit basis at the time each unit is removed or disposed of. Previously, these fees were charged all at once when the entire removal or disposal order was completed. Read more .

 Submit UK import details by 26/04/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Xiangyuexin,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 26/04/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.
 What happens if I don’t submit these details?

subject: New Regulations for Children’s Toys - Product Safety Acts Amendments / 子ども用おもちゃに関する新しい規制 - 消費生活用製品安全法の改正について
body_preview:
New Regulations for Children’s Toys - Product Safety Acts Amendments / 子ども用おもちゃに関する新しい規制 - 消費生活用製品安全法の改正について / 儿童玩具新法规 -《消费者产品安全法》修正案
English and Chinese follows Japanese ご担当者様 Amazon.co.jpで子ども用おもちゃを出品するには、2025年12月25日以降改正された日本の消費生活用製品安全法に基づく新しい規制を遵守する必要があります。対応が必要な出品情報は[アカウント健全性ダッシュボード](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/performance/account/health/product-policies?t=safe)に表示されますので、随時にご確認ください。要件と次の手順について、以下をご確認ください。 なぜこのような変更が行われるのですか？ 経済産業省（METI）は、改正消費生活用製品安全法に基づき、子ども向けのおもちゃに関する新しい安全規制を実施しました。これらの規制により、36か月未満の子ども向けに設計されたおもちゃに新たな要件が定められました。規制の詳細については、[経済産業省のウェブサイト](https://www.meti.go.jp/product_safety/kodomo/gangu_kisei.html)をご覧ください。 出品者様が、これらの新しい要件に該当する子ども用おもちゃを出品されている可能性があることがわかりました。 この問題にどう対処すればよいですか？ 新しい規制に対応するため、Amazon.co.jpのおもちゃの出品情報を確認し、すべてのおもちゃの商品詳細ページで「製造元推奨の最少年齢(月)」または、「最低読書年齢」フィールドを更新してください。「製造元推奨の最少年齢(月)」を入力する際は、対象年齢を月単位で入力する必要があります(例:0か月以上に適している場合は、「0」と入力します)。 注：年齢情報をご提供いただけない場合、販売を継続するには商品の対象年齢が確認できる書類の提出が必要となります。 年齢範囲は、合理的な根拠に基づいたものである必要があり、広告、類似商品の年齢制限、消費者の想定と矛盾しないようにしてください。使用年齢基準については、[消費生活用製品安全法]( https://www.meti.go.jp/product_safety/kodomo/pdf/siyounenreikizyun.pdf)をご覧ください。 経済産業省の法令改正により、2025年12月25日以降以下の対応を行うことが義務付けられます。 •    技術基準への適合確認 •    使用年齢基準への準拠 •    対象年齢を含

 Submit UK import details by 26/04/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Weihai EU,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 26/04/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.
 What happens if I don’t submit these details?

subject: Submit Product Safety Law compliance information for Saudi Arabia
body_preview:
96
 You can now submit PSL compliance information through the listing workflow and Manage All Inventory.
 Hello,
 You can now submit Product Safety Law (PSL) compliance information through the listing workflow for new listings, or through Manage All Inventory for existing listings.
 In November 2024, Saudi Arabia implemented the PSL, which applies to most consumer products sold in Saudi Arabia, except those regulated by the Saudi Food and Drug Authority (SFDA).
 To ensure you’re compliant, we recommend that you submit the following information as soon as possible:
- Email or URL of the manufacturer
- Email or URL of the importer if applicable, or your authorized representative in Saudi Arabia
- Safety information, warnings, safety images or disclaimers
- Proof of your product’s compliance with applicable Saudi technical standards For more information, go to Product Safety Law (PSL) .
 The Amazon Services team
 Report an issue with this email
 If you have any questions visit: Seller Central
 To change your email preferences visit: Notification Preferences
 Copyright 2026 Amazon, Inc, or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
 Amazon.com, 410 Terry Avenue North, Seattle, WA 98109-5210

- Selecciona la fecha que prefieras y reserva la fecha de recolección o entrega del envío antes de crearlo.
- Antes de la fecha seleccionada, programa la recolección de DHL llamando al +55 5345 7000 o a través de su página web, mydhl.com . En el caso de las entregas, envía las cajas a una tienda de DHL en la fecha seleccionada. Para más información, consulta Opciones de transportista asociado de Amazon .

Tomamos esta medida porque sospechamos que el listado de este producto infringe la propiedad intelectual de terceros. El listado de este producto usa la imagen protegida por derechos de autor de un propietario de derechos en su página de detalles del producto. No pudimos confirmar que cuentas con autorización para usar esta imagen protegida por derechos de autor en la página de detalles del producto. El uso no autorizado de una imagen con derechos de autor puede causar confusión en cuanto al origen, patrocinio o afiliación de los productos. La vulneración de los derechos de autor constituye una infracción de la Política de Propiedad Intelectual de Amazon .
 ¿Cómo solucionar la infracción de listados?
Para solucionar la infracción de listados, haz clic en “Resolver” junto a cada ASIN afectado en la sección “Infracciones de derechos de propiedad intelectual” de la página “Estado de la cuenta” . En compras online, el sitio web de Worten tiene el mayor tráfico de Portugal, más de 10 millones de visitas al mes.
Es en www.worten.pt y www.worten.es donde puedes mirar nuestro Marketplace.
Con más de 30 categorías, el Marketplace de Worten quiere ser la plataforma donde los clientes pueden encontrar todo lo que necesitan.

 opnieuw te activeren
body_preview:
96
 Hallo Bailian Direct,
 Sommige van je productvermeldingen zijn gedeactiveerd omdat er verplichte nalevingsvereisten voor je producten ontbreken. Bekijk de gegevens en de stappen hieronder. De betreffende productvermeldingen worden aan het einde van deze e-mail weergegeven.
 Waarom gebeurt dit?
 We hebben deze actie ondernomen omdat voor deze producten verplichte nalevingsinformatie ontbreekt. Raadpleeg onze hulp-pagina Productveiligheid en -conformiteit voor informatie over de toepasselijke wet- en regelgeving en het Amazon-beleid. We hebben gebruikgemaakt van een combinatie van geautomatiseerde middelen en deskundige menselijke beoordeling om dit probleem te identificeren en deze beslissing te nemen.

body_preview:

Soy Gabriel Martins, Business Developer en Worten worten.pt / worten.es , el mayor marketplace de Portugal.
Nuestro equipo de análisis ha señalado que una asociación con usted sería una gran oportunidad para ambos.
¿Estaría disponible para una reunión online esta semana?
Acerca de Worten - Somos el líder del mercado portugués:
- Nº 1 del comercio electrónico portugués
- Sitio web con mayor tráfico de Portugal (más de 10 millones de visitas al mes) - Ranking de mercado
- Más de 200 tiendas físicas en Portugal y España, proporcionando una oportunidad omnicanal
- Plataforma de gestión: Mirakl (se puede integrar manualmente o vía API)
- Sin costes iniciales - 6 meses
Estaré encantado de ayudarle si tiene alguna pregunta.
Muchas gracias,
Saludos Cordiales

subject: 提交商品安全文件以避免商品被停售
body_preview:
96
 尊敬的 Weihai EU：
您好！
 您的部分商品因缺少必要的商品合规信息而面临被停售的风险。查看下面的详细信息和后续步骤。受影响的商品显示在此电子邮件的末尾。
 为什么会发生这种情况？
 我们之所以采取此措施，是因为这些商品缺少必要的合规信息。请查看我们的 商品安全与合规 帮助页面，了解有关适用法律法规和亚马逊政策的信息。
 此电子邮件末尾的表格提供了特定于商品的合规性要求。
 如何重新启售商品？
 要提供所需的合规信息，请前往 账户状况 页面并找到商品合规性请求：
-
 如果您有所需的文件，请按照相关说明提交您的合规文件。
-
 如果您认为您的商品无需遵守这些要求，请提交相关文件，说明它们为何不受这些合规要求的约束。
 有关分步操作说明，请参阅 提交合规文件或对文件请求提出申诉 帮助页面。
 为避免进一步影响您的账户，请停售或删除您不打算销售或申诉的任何不合规商品。
 如果我未执行上述操作，会怎么样？
 如果您未在“账户状况”页面显示的截止日期之前提供所需的合规信息，我们可能会停售受影响的商品。
 我们愿意随时为您提供帮助。
 有关更多信息，请观看卖家大学中的 安全与合规简介 视频
 如果您有其他问题，请在您的 账户状况 控制面板上提交请求。

要销售儿童玩具，您必须满足 儿童玩具帮助页面 上列出的要求，并与我们的合作伙伴第三方测试、检验和认证 (TIC) 服务提供商合作，验证您的商品符合这些要求。

subject: Skicka in produktsäkerhetsdokumentation för att undvika att produktposterna inaktiveras

 Hej Weihai EU!
 Vissa av dina produktposter riskerar att inaktiveras på grund av att det saknas obligatorisk information om överensstämmelse för produkterna. Granska informationen och följande steg nedan. De berörda produktposterna visas i slutet av det här e-postmeddelandet.
 Varför händer det här?
 Vi vidtar den här åtgärden eftersom det saknas obligatorisk information om överensstämmelse för de här produkterna. Läs vår hjälpsida för Produktsäkerhet och -överensstämmelse för information om tillämpliga lagar, förordningar och Amazons policyer.
 Tabellen i slutet av detta e-postmeddelande innehåller produktspecifika krav för överensstämmelse.
 Hur återaktiverar jag mina produktposter?
 Om du vill tillhandahålla den begärda överensstämmelseinformationen går du till sidan Kontostatus och letar upp begäranden om produktöverensstämmelse:
-
 Om du har den obligatoriska dokumentationen ska du skicka in dina överensstämmelsedokument enligt instruktionerna.
-
 Om du tror att dina produkter är undantagna från dessa krav skickar du in dokumentation som visar varför de inte omfattas av dessa överensstämmelsekrav.

En compras online, el sitio web de Worten tiene el mayor tráfico de Portugal, más de 10 millones de visitas al mes.
Es en www.worten.pt y www.worten.es donde puedes mirar nuestro Marketplace.
Con más de 30 categorías, el Marketplace de Worten quiere ser la plataforma donde los clientes pueden encontrar todo lo que necesitan.
Con la gran demanda que sentimos, tenemos la oportunidad de aumentar nuestra gama de productos, ¡y trabajar con las mejores empresas es nuestra prioridad !

 尊敬的 Weihai EU：
您好！
 您的部分商品因缺少必要的商品合规信息而面临被停售的风险。查看下面的详细信息和后续步骤。受影响的商品显示在此电子邮件的末尾。
 为什么会发生这种情况？
 我们之所以采取此措施，是因为这些商品缺少必要的合规信息。请查看我们的 商品安全与合规 帮助页面，了解有关适用法律法规和亚马逊政策的信息。
 此电子邮件末尾的表格提供了特定于商品的合规性要求。
 如何重新启售商品？
 要提供所需的合规信息，请前往 账户状况 页面并找到商品合规性请求：
-
 如果您有所需的文件，请按照相关说明提交您的合规文件。
-
 如果您认为您的商品无需遵守这些要求，请提交相关文件，说明它们为何不受这些合规要求的约束。
 有关分步操作说明，请参阅 提交合规文件或对文件请求提出申诉 帮助页面。
 为避免进一步影响您的账户，请停售或删除您不打算销售或申诉的任何不合规商品。

 如果您未在“账户状况”页面显示的截止日期之前提供所需的合规信息，我们可能会停售受影响的商品。
 我们愿意随时为您提供帮助。

subject: Reminder: Upcoming changes to MCF and Buy with Prime packaging
body_preview:
Reminder: Upcoming changes to MCF and Buy with Prime packaging
Dear there,
Thank you for being a valued member of the Amazon Multichannel Fulfillment (MCF) and Buy with Prime community. We are reaching out to make sure you have seen that starting in April 2026, MCF and Buy with Prime will introduce two updates to how orders are packaged and shipped in the United States:
Packing slips will no longer be included by default.
Items already certified for the Ships in Product Packaging (SIPP) program on Amazon.com will ship without an Amazon overbox by default.
In addition, eligible MCF and Buy with Prime SIPP shipments will receive a discount. See the discounts table below for details: https://www2.amazonsupplychain.com/e/949422/inable-Packaging--FAQs--4--pdf/618lz1/1363808868/h/XBk-oWBas3G_VJ_7TyvkI7Rf5JXikqE4oRmyirpCbDA
These updates support Amazon’s commitment to reducing packaging waste and align MCF and Buy with Prime more closely with existing Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA) packaging practices.

 You are receiving this message because you have stranded inventory in an Amazon fulfilment centre that is scheduled for automatic removal. For a full view of stranded units scheduled for automatic removal, visit the stranded inventory dashboard and sort by auto-removal date.

 Why is this happening?
 Inventory can be scheduled for automatic removal for a variety of reasons. In this case, the reason is that the inventory is stranded. Stranded inventory is inventory without a buyable offer and requires you to either reactivate the listing or remove the inventory.
 What happens if I don't take action?
 Your stranded inventory will be returned or disposed of based on the settings you selected on “Fix stranded inventory”. To customize your settings, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Edit automatic action settings.
 If you need more time to appeal or fix a stranded inventory issue, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Delay auto removal for 30 days from the drop-down menu for each listing.

- Submit required documentation for extension or exemption requests

 Review stranded inventory scheduled for automatic removal
 You are receiving this message because you have stranded inventory in an Amazon fulfilment centre that is scheduled for automatic removal. For a full view of stranded units scheduled for automatic removal, visit the stranded inventory dashboard and sort by auto-removal date.
 Review stranded inventory
 Why is this happening?
 Inventory can be scheduled for automatic removal for a variety of reasons. In this case, the reason is that the inventory is stranded. Stranded inventory is inventory without a buyable offer and requires you to either reactivate the listing or remove the inventory.
 What happens if I don't take action?
 Your stranded inventory will be returned or disposed of based on the settings you selected on “Fix stranded inventory”. To customize your settings, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Edit automatic action settings.
 If you need more time to appeal or fix a stranded inventory issue, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Delay auto removal for 30 days from the drop-down menu for each listing.
